summary: Completed frontend testing of static GitHub Pages site after HEIC to JPG conversion and gallery update. All tests passed successfully.
passed_tests: HEIC file successfully converted to JPG at /app/cc-property-care-static/assets/deck-after.jpg (4280x3827, RGB, JPEG format)
Static site serves index.html with HTTP 200 OK
Static site serves assets/deck-after.jpg with HTTP 200 OK (3.8MB)
Proof gallery displays exactly 4 cards as expected
New deck-after.jpg image correctly displayed in gallery (Card 4)
Gallery card has correct 'After' chip label
Gallery card has correct caption 'Clean wooden deck'
Image has correct alt text 'Clean wooden deck surface after pressure washing'
Only one gallery image was replaced, other 3 cards remain intact
Root-level GitHub Pages structure verified: index.html, styles.css, main.js, assets/ all present
Page loads without console errors or runtime errors
Header and navigation working correctly
Services accordion (5 items) opens and closes correctly
All 4 book buttons link to correct Google Form (https://forms.gle/11TXTAgdrrRsnP749)
Contact information displayed correctly (phone and email)
Footer displays company name and contact info
Mobile responsive design works perfectly (390x844 viewport)
Mobile CTA bar visible and functional
Gallery displays correctly on mobile (single column layout)
Service accordion works on mobile
No console errors on mobile viewport
